AnalysisHistory.title: AnalysisHistory
AnalysisHistory.description: Stores a comprehensive record of all scam analyses performed by the app, including user-initiated checks (text, link, screenshot) and real-time call/SMS detections.

id.description: Unique identifier for the analysis record.

analysisType.description: The method or source of the analysis (e.g., 'TextInput', 'LinkCheck', 'ScreenshotScan', 'IncomingCall', 'IncomingSMS').

phoneNumber.description: The phone number associated with the analysis, if applicable (e.g., for 'IncomingCall' or 'IncomingSMS').

contentAnalyzed.description: The text or URL content that was analyzed. For screenshots, this is the extracted text; for SMS, it's the message body. For incoming calls, this may be an empty string if no specific textual content is available.

analysisTimestamp.description: The date and time when the analysis was performed or the alert was triggered.

riskLevel.description: The assessed risk level of the content or interaction (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'VeryHigh').

scamType.description: The detected type of scam or threat (e.g., 'Phishing', 'FakeBankAlert', 'UrgencyManipulation', 'FakeJobOffer', 'PaymentFraud', 'Unknown').

detectionReasons.description: A list of specific signs or patterns identified by the AI that led to the risk assessment.

recommendations.description: A list of practical safety recommendations provided to the user based on the analysis.

userAction.description: The action taken by the user in response to a real-time alert or a saved manual analysis (e.g., 'Blocked', 'Ignored', 'Reported', 'AddedToTrusted', 'None'). Defaults to 'None' if no action was taken or for manual analyses not requiring an action.

userActionTimestamp.description: The date and time when the user took a specific action, if any.

BlockedPhoneNumber.title: BlockedPhoneNumber
BlockedPhoneNumber.description: Stores phone numbers that the user has explicitly chosen to block from incoming calls or SMS messages.

id.description: Unique identifier for the blocked phone number entry.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number that has been added to the block list.

blockTimestamp.description: The date and time when the number was added to the block list.

reason.description: An optional reason or context for blocking the number (e.g., 'Reported Scam by AI', 'Manually Added').

TrustedPhoneNumber.title: TrustedPhoneNumber
TrustedPhoneNumber.description: Stores phone numbers that the user has explicitly marked as trusted, preventing them from being flagged as suspicious by real-time protection.

id.description: Unique identifier for the trusted phone number entry.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number that has been added to the trusted list.

trustTimestamp.description: The date and time when the number was added to the trusted list.

reason.description: An optional reason or context for trusting the number (e.g., 'Known Contact', 'Official Service Number').

ScamReport.title: ScamReport
ScamReport.description: Stores reports submitted by users about suspicious phone numbers or messages, contributing to a community-driven scam database.

id.description: Unique identifier for the scam report.

reportedContent.description: The content of the suspicious SMS message or a summary/context of the suspicious call.

scamType.description: The type of scam identified by the user or system for the report (e.g., 'Phishing', 'FakeBankAlert', 'UrgencyManipulation').

reportTimestamp.description: The date and time when the scam was reported.

status.description: The current status of the report (e.g., 'Submitted', 'PendingReview', 'ConfirmedScam', 'FalsePositive').

ScamStats.title: ScamStats
ScamStats.description: Aggregated statistics for reported scam phone numbers.

reportCount.description: Total number of community reports for this number.

scamType.description: The primary scam type associated with this number.

isHighRisk.description: Automatically flagged as high risk if reportCount exceeds threshold.

UserSettings.title: UserSettings
UserSettings.description: Stores user-specific preferences and settings for the ShieldCheck AI application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user's settings.

isCallProtectionEnabled.description: Indicates whether real-time protection for incoming calls is enabled.

isSmsProtectionEnabled.description: Indicates whether real-time protection for incoming SMS messages is enabled.

unlimitedAnalysisSubscription.description: Indicates if the user has an active premium subscription.

lastUpdated.description: The date and time when these settings were last modified.

definition.description: Aggregated scam data per phone number.

firestore.reasoning: The structure is extended to include aggregate statistics per phone number in a dedicated global collection. This allows the app to efficiently track how many times a specific number has been reported across the entire community and flag high-risk numbers without scanning all individual reports.
